title: Ramapuram, Alappuzha
tagline: Ramapuram, Alappuzha — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Ramapuram is a small village in Kayamkulam in the Karthikappally Taluk of Alappuzha district in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Ramapuram is a small village in Kayamkulam in the Karthikappally Taluk of Alappuzha district in Kerala, India. Famous film actress K. P. A. C. Lalitha was born in Ramapuram.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Muthukulam
topPlaces.description: Muthukulam is a backwater village and census town near Haripad in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a major village between Kayamkulam and Haripad and headquarters of the Muthukulam Block Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kannamangalam (Alappuzha)
topPlaces.description: Kannamangalam is a village in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies in Chettikulangara Grama Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Evoor Major Sri Krishnaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Evoor Major Srikrishnaswamy temple is a Krishna temple in Evoor near Haripad, in Alappuzha, Kerala. It is said to have originated five millennium ago following Khandava Dahanam.

topPlaces.name: Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad
topPlaces.description: Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad near Harippad, Alappuzha, Kerala is one of the oldest temples in Kerala.This temple is dedicated to Durga Devi and the goddess is also known as Karthiyayini Devi.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kayamkulam
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, NTPC Kayamkulam is located in Cheppad, Haripad. Affiliated to CBSE, this school started operating on 28 July 1999.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkan Koyikkal Devi Temple Puthiyavila
topPlaces.description: Vadakkan Koyikkal temple, a Devi temple or Bhagavathi temple near Kayamkulam, is situated in Puthiyavila village, Alappuzha in Kerala. Sree Parvathy Devi is mainly worshiped in the temple.

topPlaces.name: Kareelakulangara
topPlaces.description: Kareelakulangara is a small neighbourhood situated in Pathiyoor village of Alappuzha district of Kerala state of India. National Highway NH47 passes through this junction.

topPlaces.name: Cheppad
topPlaces.description: Cheppad is a scenic village near Haripad in Alappuzha district in Kerala State, India. It is about halfway between Kochi and Thiruvananthapuram on the National Highway 47 (now NH 66).

items.note: Muthukulam is a backwater village and census town near Haripad in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a major village between Kayamkulam and Haripad and headquarters of the Muthukulam Block Panchayat.
Kannamangalam is a village in Mavelikkara Taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies in Chettikulangara Grama Panchayath.
Evoor Major Srikrishnaswamy temple is a Krishna temple in Evoor near Haripad, in Alappuzha, Kerala. It is said to have originated five millennium ago following Khandava Dahanam.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad & around

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramapuram, Alappuzha?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramapuram, Alappuzha is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramapuram, Alappuzha?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramapuram, Alappuzha?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramapuram, Alappuzha at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramapuram, Alappuzha?
faq.a: Stays in Ramapuram, Alappuzha start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramapuram, Alappuzha?
faq.a: The top attractions are Muthukulam, Kannamangalam (Alappuzha), Evoor Major Sri Krishnaswamy Temple, Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kayamkulam.
